conditional: Barcelona must pay Julián Álvarez's €500m release clause for a deal to happen.
headline: Atlético Madrid Blocks Julián Álvarez Transfer to Barcelona
body: Atlético Madrid has issued a statement declaring they will not sell Julián Álvarez to Barcelona, insisting a deal would only occur if his €500m release clause is met.
text:
🚨 Atlético Madrid statement to @diarioas.

“There is no amount of money for which Barça can buy Julián Álvarez. He will not be transferred to Barcelona”.

“Either they pay the release clause for €500m or there is no deal”.
draft_caption:
Unconfirmed report RUMOUR | Atlético Madrid Blocks Julián Álvarez Transfer to Barcelona
